nasb.text: The Lord will command His lovingkindness in the daytime; And His song will be with me in the night, A prayer to the God of my life.

esv.text: By day the Lord  commands his steadfast love, and at night his song is with me, a prayer to the God of my life.

cnv.text: 白天耶和華賜下他的慈愛； 夜間我要向他歌頌， 向賜我生命的　神禱告。

ccb.text: 白天耶和华将祂的慈爱浇灌我； 夜间我歌颂祂， 向赐我生命的上帝祷告。

csbs.text: 白天，耶和华赐下他的慈爱； 夜间，称颂他的歌与我相伴； 我向着我的生命之神祷告。
